title: brachyspatha zeylanica
intro: Brachyspatha zeylanica, also known as the Ceylonese or Indian forest flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Arum. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Brachyspatha zeylanica include treating fever, reducing inflammation, and aiding in digestion, as well as providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
